=== 1981-07-10  The Wheel's Still In Spin .txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
Drammenshallen  
Drammen, Norway 
1981 July 10

*The Wheel's Still In Spin* 
A Southside Butcher Production

CD 1
1. The Times They Are A-Changin' 
2. Gotta Serve Somebody 
3. I Believe In You 
4. Like A Rolling Stone 
5. Till I Get It Right 
6. Man Gave Names To All The Animals 
7. Maggie's Farm 
8. Girl From The North Country 
9. Ballad Of A Thin Man 
10. In The Summertime 
11. Slow Train 
12. unknown (sung by????)
13. Let's Begin 
14. Lenny Bruce 
15. Mr. Tambourine Man
16. Solid Rock 

CD 2
17. Just Like A Woman 
18. Forever Young 
19. Jesus Is The One  
20. Heart Of Mine 
21. When You Gonna Wake Up 
22. In The Garden 
23. Blowin' In The Wind  
24. It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic) 
25. Knockin' On Heaven's Door

Bonustracks: (Earls Court / London, England  July 1st 1981)
26. Here comes the sun (George Harrison)
27. Girl From The North Country
28. Dead Man, Dead Man
29. Simple Twist Of Fate
30. Shot Of Love

File names & tags edited by Chopen, February 2010

=== LBF-07222-bd81-07-10-sb-LB-7222.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 7/10/81, Drammen, Norway, 2CDR

LB-7222, (76min+74min), sb; *The Wheel's Still In Spin*, A Southside Butcher Production; bittorrent download 02/09; has tv band on d1t8; same recording as LB-339 based on same clapping wavs at end of d1t8; in comparison this has more hiss; (did not listen to all of this)

drop end of d1t1, d1t9, between cdrs, end of d2t3,

CD 1, 1. The Times They Are A-Changin', 2. Gotta Serve Somebody, 3. I Believe In You, 4. Like A Rolling Stone, 5. Till I Get It Right, 6. Man Gave Names To All The Animals, 7. Maggie's Farm, 8. Girl From The North Country, 9. Ballad Of A Thin Man, 10. In The Summertime, 11. Slow Train, 12. unknown (sung by????), 13. Let's Begin, 14. Lenny Bruce, 15. Mr. Tambourine Man, 16. Solid Rock, CD 2, 17. Just Like A Woman, 18. Forever Young, 19. Jesus Is The One, 20. Heart Of Mine, 21. When You Gonna Wake Up, 22. In The Garden, 23. Blowin' In The Wind, 24. It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic), 25. Knockin' On Heaven's Door, Bonustracks: (Earls Court / London, England July 1st 1981), 26. Here comes the sun (George Harrison), 27. Girl From The North Country, 28. Dead Man, Dead Man, 29. Simple Twist Of Fate, 30. Shot Of Love

Please retain this info file and its LB number as a marker for this lossless set
and if you spread it please list it in the description to avoid others getting duplicates
